exposure_diagnostics.industry_neutrality: not testable: historical PIT industry labels are unavailable

interpretation_limits: This is a signal first-look, not a CNY 2.1m portfolio return backtest.
B070 is a liquid HS300/CSI500/SSE50-derived PIT subset, not the full A-share market; a microcap-concentrated MAX effect may be absent.
B076 is inferred PIT circulating market cap, adequate for exposure control but not total-market-cap or execution-capacity certification.
Qfq OHLC lacks nominal prices, adjustment factors, historical ST and exact limit prices, corporate actions, and a delist cash ledger.
Input caches are gitignored; hashes identify this run but a fresh clone cannot rebuild it.
No broker, paper account, product strategy, or production configuration was touched.

protocol.contamination: C2-DIRECT: the same B070 future-return dates have been inspected in prior trials; a positive result is capped at a paper candidate pending genuinely prospective evidence
protocol.entry_cash_rule: freeze quintiles before execution; inferred limit-up and no-later-entry slots earn zero cash return and are not replaced
protocol.execution_label: first later tradestatus=1 open; N1 earliest legal T+1 close; N20/N60 first tradeable close at or after the entry-inclusive target
protocol.inference: monthly Spearman rank IC, Newey-West lag 3, circular 6-month block bootstrap with 5000 draws
protocol.raw_signal: raw_lowmax = -max(adjusted close-to-close return over the final 20 market sessions through each complete month-end)
protocol.residual_signal: monthly percentile-rank MAX20 regressed on percentile-rank RVOL20, log PIT circulating market cap, and RET20; signal is negative residual
protocol.suspension_rule: carried qfq close on a suspended market session contributes a zero daily return; the window is not extended to 20 tradeable ticker days
protocol.universe: latest B070 PIT 800-member snapshot visible at each month-end
